title: the mass production evas and Toji
display_title: the mass production evas and Toji
wikitext:
[]: the mass production evas and Toji             Quote Post by xfactor30seconds » Fri Mar 20, 2009 3:37 pm Togi's eva was created the same way the mass production evas were then why didn't it have a S2 engine? Also Ritsuko said that all evas have to have a soul to be able to function then who was in toji's eva? I thought at first it could be his mother but the eva turned out to be an angel so how then did he pilot it? Did the angel just make it appear like Toji was piloting th eva? CONFUSION

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Mar 20, 2009 3:41 pm Uh, no. Unit-03 and -04 were not produced ala MP Evas. They were made ala -00/01/02. Further, -03 is not an Angel. It was infected by an Angel en route. The soul inside is Toji's mother.

[]:             Quote Post by xfactor30seconds » Fri Mar 20, 2009 3:42 pm mkay i just wasnt sure if it was like karwou and already an angel

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Mar 20, 2009 4:03 pm Eva development chart: Adam > failed evas > prototype 00 > production 02, 03 & 04 (05 & 06 not completed) > mass production 05-13 (14-16 not completed) Lilith > test 01

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Fri Mar 20, 2009 7:24 pm 03 had Toji's mother's soul. All the kids in Shinji's class had mothers who died mysteriously while working at Nerv. There has been speculation that Toji's sister was used instead, but I don't see why they would when they already had his mom.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Mar 20, 2009 7:30 pm rberlin wrote: All the kids in Shinji's class had mothers who died mysteriously while working at Nerv.

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Fri Mar 20, 2009 7:34 pm Because Anno loved his mom and hates his dad. That's why every character (except Ritsuko) loves their mom and hates their dad. Also, maternal instinct.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 20, 2009 7:47 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Why does it have to be a mother and not a mother OR a father?

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Fri Mar 20, 2009 8:30 pm I would also think that a mother's love for her child would be much more unconditional than a father's. Have you heard the phrase "a face only a father could love." I sure as hell haven't.

[]:             Quote Post by GVman » Sat Mar 21, 2009 8:09 pm Because moms>dads. Or, at least that's what happened in my life.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 21, 2009 10:21 pm Also from the concept: Sadamoto wrote: And just about that time, I was watching the NHK [public TV channel] program "Brain and Heart" and learned about the existence of the A10 nerve, and I told Anno about the idea that popped into my head at that time. That was the idea where "the dead mother is inside the robot, which is operated by mental/psychical bonding with the child. Moreover, parent-child relations are parched/strained due to the death of the mother at a young age."

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Mar 22, 2009 11:21 am EVA SAY: FADDUR CANNOT LOVE. WHO KILL THEIR CHILDREN WHO CAN'T FRIGTH BACK!

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Mar 30, 2009 8:13 pm Please dont ridicule me if this comes off as stupid - Bu I honestly didnt know that all the EVAS were moms; just the core 3 - Asuka, Rei and Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Tue Mar 31, 2009 10:09 am Shinji-Sama1stKami wrote: Please dont ridicule me if this comes off as stupid - Bu I honestly didnt know that all the EVAS were moms; just the core 3 - Asuka, Rei and Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Tue Mar 31, 2009 10:43 pm Sharaz Destler wrote: Shinji-Sama1stKami wrote: Please dont ridicule me if this comes off as stupid - Bu I honestly didnt know that all the EVAS were moms; just the core 3 - Asuka, Rei and Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 31, 2009 11:05 pm LIGHTFIRELT wrote: Actually this idea has been floating around for eons..

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Mar 31, 2009 11:37 pm Ugh, souls are more complicated than just "every EVA is mommy." Here's a list: EVA-00: Part of Rei, not her mother. She doesn't have one, or at least not one that could be found on Earth. EVA-01: Yui Ikari EVA-02: Kyoko Soryu EVA-03: ? Suzuhara EVA-04: ? Probably had a soul, but we don't know who was going to be pilot. If -04 was going to go to Kaworu, then it probably had a similar soul to the MP Evas. MPEVA (05-13): Any old female souls. Kaworu shows his ability to sync with any EVA at any rate, and the Dummy Plugs are based off of him.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 31, 2009 11:58 pm Legendary wrote: EVA-05 & -06: Scrapped for parts

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 01, 2009 12:26 am @Topic: Units 03 and 04 were Production Types just like Unit 02. The soul inside Unit 03 was Toji's mother (I think somewhere in the series it said his father was still alive, but was always at work, I could be wrong). But the Angel Bardiel took complete control of the Eva. It wasn't an Angel to being with. The Angel infected the Eva while it was being transported to Japan. Unit's 5-13 were Mass Production Types, which had the S2 Engine. But not Units 00 through 04.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Apr 01, 2009 12:32 am Reichu wrote: The idea that there was a "scrapped" Eva-05 and Eva-06 seems to just be an artifact of some translations combined with fan imagination, as opposed to anything substantive. I made a post about it somewhere.
